Noto Naskh Arabic is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.
See https://fonts.google.com/noto/specimen/Noto+Naskh+Arabic and
https://scripts.sil.org/OFL for the full license text.

Bundled here for use as a deterministic, reproducible font fixture in the
docfold benchmark (arabic_report document).
